scripts.start: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && npm run ng -- serve
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && cd %INIT_CWD% && npm run ng -- build --output-hashing=none --optimization --aot
scripts.watch: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && npm run ng -- build --watch --configuration development
scripts.test: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && npm run ng -- test
scripts.build-bundle-prod: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && cd %INIT_CWD% && npm run ng -- build && npx webpack
scripts.build-bundle: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && cd %INIT_CWD% && npm run ng -- build --configuration development && npx webpack
scripts.build-bundle-watch: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && cd %INIT_CWD% && npm run ng -- build --configuration development && npx webpack --watch
scripts.test-editor: npm --prefix ../dbm-designer-core run build && cd %INIT_CWD% && npm run ng -- serve --open
